mapper.update: MERGE INTO TBL_WH_LOC_M AS target USING (SELECT #{locId} AS LOC_ID) AS source ON (target.LOC_ID = source.LOC_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET LOC_NM = #{locNm}, AISLE = #{aisle}, RACK = #{rack}, LEVEL_NO = #{levelNo}, PICKING_YN = #{pickingYn}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, -- 추가 UPDT_USER = #{saveUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CMPY_CD, WH_CD, ZONE_ID, LOC_CD, LOC_NM, AISLE, RACK, LEVEL_NO, PICKING_YN, USE_YN, SAVE_USER, SAVE_TIME, DELETED_YN) VALUES (#{cmpyCd}, #{whCd}, #{zoneId}, #{locCd}, #{locNm}, #{aisle}, #{rack}, #{levelNo}, #{pickingYn}, #{useYn}, #{saveUser}, GETDATE(), 'N');
